portfolioModal.cta: I would like a similar website

items.title: RMK Songs
items.modalDesc: Website design and development for RMK Songs, an online music sales platform built from scratch based on client-provided design specifications. The project was developed through direct communication with the client to ensure the final result matched the expected visual style and functionality. Focus was placed on clean design implementation, user experience, and responsive performance.

items.title: Cookies & Más
items.modalDesc: Website design and development for Cookies & Más, based on the structure and visual references of the previous site. Due to the use of an outdated paid theme, a full replication of the WooCommerce store was carried out using Elementor Free, ensuring visual accuracy and functional continuity. Improvements were implemented to optimize the user flow and resolve usability issues identified in the original version.

items.title: Brand Pro
items.modalDesc: Website design and development based on client-provided references and brand guidelines. Through feedback and revisions, the final design was defined and implemented in WordPress. The project focused on visual consistency, user experience, and responsive design.

items.title: Emprender y Elevarse
items.modalDesc: Website design and development based on client-provided references and brand guidelines. Through feedback and revisions, the final design was defined and implemented in WordPress. The project focused on visual consistency, user experience, and responsive design.

items.title: Togo Market
items.modalDesc: Website development in WordPress using a client-provided installation. The project started with the design and build of the homepage, following the brand guidelines. After the homepage was approved, I proceeded with the development of the remaining pages, ensuring visual consistency, responsive design, and proper functionality.

items.title: RedCloud
items.modalDesc: Website development in WordPress using a client-provided installation. The project started with the design and build of the homepage, following the brand guidelines. After the homepage was approved, I proceeded with the development of the remaining pages, ensuring visual consistency, responsive design, and proper functionality.

items.title: SYM 360
items.modalDesc: Website development in WordPress using a client-provided installation. The project started with the design and build of the homepage, following the brand guidelines. After the homepage was approved, I proceeded with the development of the remaining pages, ensuring visual consistency, responsive design, and proper functionality.

items.title: Mego Afek
items.modalDesc: Website development in WordPress using Elementor, based on a client-provided PSD design. I translated the design into a functional website, maintaining the original visual structure while ensuring responsive layout and cross-device compatibility.

items.title: Blog del Rebobinador
items.modalDesc: Design and development of an e-learning platform, currently used as an informational website. The design was created in Figma and, once approved, implemented in WordPress. The project focused on clear structure, intuitive navigation, and responsive design, allowing future scalability into a full learning environment.

items.title: Hipnosis Group
items.modalDesc: Full website redesign using the client's existing WordPress installation. The project was completed without prior Figma designs, implementing changes directly based on client requests and real-time feedback. Maintenance, updates, and overall optimization were handled to ensure proper site functionality.

items.title: Dilo
items.modalDesc: Website design and development starting from a Figma design and later implemented in WordPress using Elementor. I was responsible for the visual structure, color palette selection, and full layout implementation. The client provided only the logo. A responsive and functional website aligned with the project goals was delivered.

items.title: Next!
items.modalDesc: Website development in WordPress using Elementor, based on a client-provided design in Adobe Illustrator. I was responsible for accurately translating the delivered design into a functional website, ensuring proper layout structure, responsive behavior, and cross-device compatibility.

items.title: Travsecrets
items.modalDesc: Website development based on a Figma design, focused on an immersive visual experience. I implemented a custom parallax effect simulating moving clouds that gradually fade as the user scrolls, smoothly revealing the content below. Pixel-perfect layout, smooth animations, performance optimization, and responsive design for desktop and mobile devices.
